stepsSubtitle: Three simple steps — done in under a minute.
step1Desc: Select up to 5 password-protected PDFs from your device. We accept files up to 100 MB each.
step2Desc: If your PDF has a user password, enter it in the field provided. Owner-password restrictions are removed automatically.
step3Desc: Once processed, download your fully unlocked PDF with all restrictions removed and ready to use.
faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about unlocking PDFs.
faq1Question: What types of PDF protection can you remove?
faq1Answer: We can remove owner-password restrictions (printing, editing, copying) automatically. For user-password protected PDFs (requiring a password to open), you'll need to enter the password — we cannot bypass unknown passwords.
faq2Question: Is it safe to upload my PDF?
faq2Answer: Yes. All files are transferred over HTTPS encryption and automatically deleted from our servers within 1 hour. We never store or share your documents.
faq3Question: What if I don't know the PDF password?
faq3Answer: If the PDF requires a password to open (user password) and you don't know it, we cannot unlock it. However, owner-password restrictions (which only limit editing/printing) are removed automatically without a password.
faq4Question: Will unlocking change the content of my PDF?
faq4Answer: No. Unlocking only removes the security restrictions — all text, images, formatting, and pages remain completely intact.
faq5Question: How many PDFs can I unlock at once?
faq5Answer: You can upload and unlock up to 5 PDFs in a single session. Each file can be up to 100 MB. For larger batches, simply run multiple sessions.
